description: This file defines a NotificationsProvider class that manages notifications state in a Flutter application. It handles loading notifications from a database, marking notifications as read, and simulating real-time notification updates via periodic timers.

classes.name: NotificationsProvider
classes.description: A ChangeNotifier class that manages notification data, updates, and real-time simulation for a Flutter app.

methods.name: NotificationsProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with a required database.

methods.name: loadInitial
methods.description: Loads initial notifications from the database and starts mock real-time updates.

methods.name: markRead
methods.description: Marks a specific notification as read in the local list and database.

methods.name: _startMockRealtime
methods.description: Starts a periodic timer that inserts simulated notifications to emulate real-time updates.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cancels the timer and cleans up resources when the provider is disposed.
